message:
feat(sql): add CASE, CAST, and subquery support to compiled execution

- Add CASE expression code generation (nested if-else)
- Add CAST expression code generation (type coercion)
- Add subquery pre-execution: executor runs IN/EXISTS subqueries before
  codegen, passes results to generated code as inline constants
- Subquery results with <=10 values are inlined as OR chains
- Simplify shouldCompile() to always try compiled execution first

The compiled path now handles more SQL features. Interpreted path
remains as fallback for edge cases (large subqueries, unsupported ops).
